summary: Bachelor of Informatics Engineering and Backend/Full-Stack Engineer focusing on industrial system efficiency. Deeply interested in automation, Industrial IoT, and integrating machine data into reliable software architectures.

responsibilities: Developing and maintaining backend APIs using C# .NET for real-time production monitoring systems.
Building backend services to listen to MQTT topics from industrial machines and seamlessly ingest real-time JSON data into MySQL databases.
Managing operational data pipelines and ensuring the high availability of software architectures within a high-paced manufacturing environment.

key_projects.name: Real-time Production Monitoring Dashboard
key_projects.description: Built a full-stack system (C# .NET Backend, Vue.js Frontend, MySQL) to monitor OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) data and inspection metrics in real-time.

key_projects.name: Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) Data Pipeline
key_projects.description: Developed a Python script to fetch JSON data and images from the FTP servers of inspection machines, automatically processing and distributing them into relational MySQL tables.

key_projects.name: Project Control Management System (PCMS)
key_projects.description: Designed the frontend architecture using Next.js and integrated it with backend services for a comprehensive industrial project control management system.

education: Bachelor of Informatics Engineering, Universitas Mikroskil, 2024
